rationale: Fin. Code §351.051 governs licensing of property tax loan lenders. It does not reference or depend on the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). Increasing the exemption has no bearing on lender licensing requirements.
quote:
A person must hold a license issued under this chapter to:
(1) engage in the business of making, transacting, or negotiating property tax loans
_note: No conflict. The rule concerns lender licensing; the proposed change to the homestead exemption amount is unrelated.
